schema.name: BitSightCompanyRatingDetails_CL
schema.description: The BitSightCompanyRatingDetails table contains per-risk-vector rating breakdowns for each portfolio company from the BitSight API ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: risk_vector_slug
columns.description: URL-friendly identifier for the risk vector (dict key -- not populated by CCF JSONPath; use risk_vector_label).

columns.name: risk_vector_label
columns.description: Human-readable name of the risk vector (API field: name).

columns.name: risk_category
columns.description: Parent risk category for the risk vector (API field: category).

columns.name: rating
columns.description: Numeric score for this risk vector.

columns.name: grade
columns.description: Letter grade for this risk vector.

columns.name: percentile
columns.description: Percentile rank compared to peers for this risk vector (0-100).

columns.name: grade_color
columns.description: Hex color code associated with the grade for UI display (e.g., '#239563').

columns.name: display_url
columns.description: URL to the risk vector detail page in BitSight portal.

columns.name: beta
columns.description: Indicates if this risk vector is in beta status.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
